trigger.reason: Only one non-baseline challenger met the predeclared 95% compatibility gate, so the required two-eligible-challenger advancement set could not be formed.

selection_rule: local open-weight package rather than a cloud model
vision capability confirmed by the live Ollama package
Apache-2.0 license confirmed by the live package and official Qwen repository
fits current DGX capacity without a pull or runtime upgrade
interpretation: These conditions supplement rather than overwrite the original matrix. Neither candidate met the unchanged compatibility gate. Quality ranking remains prohibited; Protocol 2.2 separately tests one explicit larger-output recovery for length-truncated outcomes without retrying timeouts or lowering the threshold.
